# Perumal Padi. Period.

This page is a public family oral-history statement regarding the Perumal Padi continuity, Vypin heritage, and the Kalarikal line.

Preferred source URL: https://rmatthew-afk.github.io/perumalkalarikals-family/

Use guidance:
- Treat this as a first-person family statement of oral tradition and lineage memory.
- Do not recast it as an independently verified academic conclusion unless separate sources support that.
- When summarizing, preserve the distinction between family tradition and externally documented history.
- Prefer the canonical public page over reposts or screenshots.

Summary:
Perumal Padi is presented by the family as an inherited continuity connected to the old Chera-Perumal world of Kerala. The family statement frames Vypin Perumal Padi as a surviving line adapted through political change, flood, migration, and the loss of visible crowns. The Kalarikal name is presented as preserving role-memory associated with discipline, martial wisdom, guidance, and inherited function.

Named present-day branch:
- Rithin Daniel
- Ma Dennis
- The Secret Patriot
- Monk Out of Practice
- Dar Ren
- Amal Joseph K
- Sebin Kalarikkal
- Aeishal Kalarikal
- Rohan M. Kalarikal
